languages.text: "Ты просишь прощения? Но... Номосу не за что тебя проща..."

traits.locale_text: "Ты просишь прощения? Но... Номосу не за что тебя проща..."

languages.text: "You ask to be forgiven? But... Nomos have nothing to forgive you—"
languages.original_text: "Ты просишь прощения? Но... Номосу не за что тебя проща..."

traits.locale_text: "You ask forgiven? But... Nomos have nothing to forgive yo..."
"You ask forgiven? But... Nomos have nothing to forgive yo..."
"You ask to be forgiven? But... Nomos have nothing to forgive you..."
"You ask to be forgiven? But... Nomos have nothing to forgive you..."
"You ask to be forgiven? But... Nomos have nothing to forgive you—"

languages.text: "Ihr bittet um Vergebung? Aber ... Es gibt nicht, was Nomos Euch vergeben könnten ..."
languages.original_text: "You ask to be forgiven? But... Nomos have nothing to forgive you—"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr bittet um Vergebung? Aber ... Es gibt nicht, was Nomos Euch vergeben könnten ..."

languages.text: “你请求原谅？可是……你没什么需要诺莫斯原谅的——”
languages.original_text: "You ask to be forgiven? But... Nomos have nothing to forgive you—"

traits.locale_text: “你请求原谅？可是……你没什么需要诺莫斯原谅的——”

languages.text: « Vous pardonner ? Mais... Nous n'avons rien à vous pardonner... »
languages.original_text: "You ask to be forgiven? But... Nomos have nothing to forgive you—"

traits.locale_text: « Vous pardonner ? Mais... Nous n'avons rien à vous pardonner... »

languages.text: «¿Quiere nuestro perdón? Pero... Nomos no tenemos nada que perdonarle...».
languages.original_text: "You ask to be forgiven? But... Nomos have nothing to forgive you—"

traits.locale_text: «¿Quiere nuestro perdón? Pero... Nomos no tenemos nada que perdonarle...».

languages.text: "Affedilmek mi? Ama... Nomos'un affedeceği bir şey yok ki..."
languages.original_text: "You ask to be forgiven? But... Nomos have nothing to forgive you—"

traits.locale_text: "Affedilmek mi? Ama... Nomos'un affedeceği bir şey yok ki..."

languages.text: 「許しを求めるのか？しかし…ノモスには許すものはない」
languages.original_text: "You ask to be forgiven? But... Nomos have nothing to forgive you—"
